name: SI Imaging Services

overview.value: SI Imaging Services (SIIS), headquartered in Daejeon, Republic of Korea, is part of the Satrec Initiative Group and describes itself as a world-leading Earth observation solutions provider. It holds sales rights for SpaceEye-T and for KOMPSAT's optical and SAR imagery, and provides methane monitoring data through a partnership with GHGSat.

focus.value: Exclusive image data provider / marketing and sales representative for the KOMPSAT-series satellite imagery

notes: Added in the audit Phase 3 backfill (2026-07-08), verify-then-add.
